IonQ.rationale: Trimmed growth toward fresh rev_yoy of 0.44, still elevated for pre-scale quantum but below prior 0.55.

Astera Labs.rationale: Lowered from 0.5 as fresh YoY (17.5% TTM) is decelerating, though forward AI connectivity demand keeps it elevated.

CoreWeave.rationale: unchanged: no rev_yoy provided; $6bn TTM consistent with high-growth GPU-cloud trajectory.

Palantir.rationale: Nudged down toward fresh 16.7% TTM YoY, though accelerating US commercial supports premium above trailing.

Lumentum.rationale: unchanged: fresh 18.2% YoY roughly consistent with current growth given datacom optics ramp.

Applied Optoelectronics.rationale: Lowered from 0.4 as fresh 11.3% YoY undershoots prior assumption.

Micron.rationale: Raised HBM/AI segment rev_bn and quality/earn_quality modestly given strong 55% YoY memory upcycle.

AMD.rationale: Trimmed growth as fresh total YoY only 8.1%, signaling slower blended ramp despite strong AI segment.

NVIDIA.rationale: Slightly lowered growth reflecting decelerating 17.4% TTM YoY off huge base, other inputs intact.

Broadcom.rationale: Nudged AI-segment rev_bn up on continued custom-ASIC/networking traction; growth unchanged.

Marvell.rationale: unchanged: low total YoY reflects legacy drag but AI custom silicon supports forward growth assumption.

AppLovin.rationale: unchanged: fresh total YoY low but AI ad-engine mix supports higher forward growth.

Vertiv.rationale: unchanged: datacenter cooling/power backlog supports growth above trailing 6% YoY.

Coherent.rationale: unchanged: fresh 4.9% YoY offset by AI optics recovery keeping forward view intact.

Meta.rationale: unchanged: fresh 6.1% YoY is total; AI-driven ad revenue segment supports higher forward growth.

Oracle.rationale: unchanged: OCI/AI cloud backlog supports growth above trailing 8% total YoY.

Microsoft.rationale: unchanged: Azure AI momentum supports growth above 4.2% total company YoY.

Texas Instruments.rationale: unchanged: cyclical analog recovery keeps forward growth above trailing 6% YoY.

Amazon.rationale: unchanged: AWS AI segment supports growth above 3.7% total company YoY.

Alphabet.rationale: unchanged: Cloud/AI segment supports growth above 4.5% total YoY.

Qualcomm.rationale: unchanged: flat/negative YoY confirms low growth assumption.

Apple.rationale: unchanged: 3.6% total YoY consistent with modest AI-driven upside assumption.

Cisco.rationale: unchanged: 2.4% YoY consistent with low growth view.

IBM.rationale: unchanged: 1.5% YoY consistent with low growth assumption.

Tesla.rationale: Nudged down slightly given weak 3.2% TTM YoY; AI/autonomy optionality keeps it above trailing.
